message:
feat: Implement contact form and support ticket system

Implements complete support ticket functionality:
- Contact page with form and validation
- Support tickets API (create, view, reply)
- Admin tickets API with filtering and management
- User ticket view in settings (/settings/tickets)
- Admin ticket management page (/admin/tickets)
- Support permissions for admin roles
- Rate limiting and spam protection (honeypot)
- LocalStorage persistence for user tickets

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-96v3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
